$schema_note: Registry of authorized, version-pinned rule/standard sources used by rules-dependent skills (crossfit-rules-and-standards-advisor, crossfit-competition-workout-strategist). This repo embeds NO proprietary manuals and scrapes no site. Entries are metadata pointers only; rule TEXT must be supplied or confirmed by the user at request time. Skills must check event/season/division, use only a matching entry, warn when stale, and never silently apply a superseded version.

policy.on_missing_match: Provide a clearly-labeled conditional analysis and request the official rule text for the specific event/season/division; never fabricate standards or penalties.
policy.staleness_warning: If the requested event/season does not match an entry's season, warn that standards may have changed and require confirmation from current official sources or event staff.

sources.document_title: Competition Rulebook (ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDER — not real rule text)
sources.official_source_reference: Provide the official URL/citation supplied by the user at request time.
sources.notes: Illustrative entry showing the required shape. It carries NO rule content and MUST NOT be treated as authoritative. Replace with a real, user-authorized source (with full season/effective_date/authorization_status) before any rule-dependent answer relies on it. Until then, rules-dependent skills operate in conditional mode and request official text.
